metadata.note: Candidate 27 clean rebuild. The upper bound is stated for normalized valid trial states and the same nonrelativistic Hamiltonian; helium numbers use a one-parameter effective-charge product trial state.

beats.prompt: The expected energy becomes the sum of each exact energy times its nonnegative probability weight. It is literally a weighted average of the spectrum.
beats.label: The expected energy becomes the sum of each exact energy times its nonnegative probability weight. I

beats.prompt: And every weighted average is at least its smallest entry.
beats.label: And every weighted average is at least its smallest entry.

beats.prompt: Equality occurs only when the trial state has support entirely inside the ground-energy eigenspace. Any excited-state component pushes the average upward.
beats.label: Equality occurs only when the trial state has support entirely inside the ground-energy eigenspace.
